title: viola × olimpia
intro: Viola × olimpia, also known as the Olimpia pansy or viola hybrid, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the delicate violet (Viola odorata). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Viola × olimpia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Viola × olimpia is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
